# TJ's Pizza Products

> Australian family-owned wholesale pizza base and dough ball manufacturer in Warnervale, NSW Central Coast. Supplying commercial kitchens, restaurants, pizza trucks, pubs, clubs, schools and canteens since 2002 — nationally through PFD Food Services and direct from the factory. HACCP food safety certified. No artificial preservatives, colours or flavours. No soy. No milk products. Vegan friendly dough balls.

Key facts: founded 2002; 500+ commercial customers; 2000m² HACCP-certified factory at Doherty Close, Warnervale NSW 2259; distributed nationally by PFD Food Services; contact Jeff Knox 0402 091 718, jeff@tjspizzaproducts.com.au.

## Products

- [Frozen Dough Ball Range](https://tjspizzaproducts.com.au/products/frozen-dough-balls): Signature product. Hand-stretched, 9 sizes from 150g to 1kg, vegan friendly, 12 months frozen shelf life. Suited to Neapolitan, NY, Roman and wood-fire pizza.
- [Traditional Pizza Bases](https://tjspizzaproducts.com.au/products/traditional-pizza-bases): Par-baked bases in 6, 8 and 9 inch. Up to 3 weeks chilled or 12 months frozen.
- [Gluten Free Range](https://tjspizzaproducts.com.au/products/gluten-free): 9 and 11 inch bases produced in a dedicated, fully segregated HACCP-certified facility — no cross-contamination.
- [Fresh Frozen Range](https://tjspizzaproducts.com.au/products/fresh-frozen): Bases snap-frozen at peak quality.
- [Garlic Butter & Cheese](https://tjspizzaproducts.com.au/products/garlic-butter-cheese): Pre-topped bases, freezer to oven. Herb, bacon, bruschetta and mushroom & fetta variants.
- [Square Pizza Base](https://tjspizzaproducts.com.au/products/square-pizza-base): Cut-to-shape bases for pubs, canteens and clubs. Custom sizes to half-metre.
- [DinoBite Kids Pizza Base](https://tjspizzaproducts.com.au/products/dinobite-kids): Dinosaur-shaped par-baked bases for kids menus and school canteens.

## Company

- [About](https://tjspizzaproducts.com.au/about): Family story — from a service-station pizza outlet (2002) to a national wholesale manufacturer. Team: Jeff Knox (Director), Rhys Wellfare (Managing Director), Paul Lagwa (QLD Sales).
- [FAQ](https://tjspizzaproducts.com.au/faq): Minimum orders, shelf life, vegan/gluten-free, national delivery, HACCP certification.
- [Contact](https://tjspizzaproducts.com.au/contact): Wholesale pricing and sample boxes. Phone 0402 091 718.
- [Home Cooks](https://tjspizzaproducts.com.au/home-cooks): Recipes, oven tips and the DinoBite kids competition.

## Full content

- [llms-full.txt](https://tjspizzaproducts.com.au/llms-full.txt): complete site content in markdown.
